name: UNIVERSAL HEALTH REALTY INCOME TRUST
summary: Universal Health Realty Income Trust (UHT) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that commenced operations in 1986. It invests in healthcare and human service related facilities including acute care hospitals, behavioral health care hospitals, specialty facilities, free-standing emergency departments, childcare centers, and medical/office buildings. As of February 25, 2026, it holds seventy-seven real estate investments or commitments in twenty-one states, with significant lease relationships with Universal Health Services, Inc. (UHS) subsidiaries.

products.name: Acute Care Hospital Leases
products.description: Ownership and leasing of three acute care hospital facilities to UHS subsidiaries.

products.name: Behavioral Health Hospital Leases
products.description: Ownership and leasing of three behavioral health care hospital facilities to UHS subsidiaries and joint ventures.

products.name: Medical/Office Buildings (MOBs)
products.description: Ownership and leasing of sixty-one MOBs to UHS subsidiaries and unaffiliated third parties across multiple states.

products.name: Free-Standing Emergency Departments (FEDs)
products.description: Ownership and leasing of four free-standing emergency department facilities.

products.name: Preschool and Childcare Centers
products.description: Ownership and leasing of four preschool and childcare center facilities.

partnerships.description: UHS subsidiary serves as Advisor under an Advisory Agreement; UHS subsidiaries lease five hospital facilities and multiple MOBs from UHT.
Joint venture partner with UHS subsidiary leasing Clive Behavioral Health facility in Clive, Iowa.
Guarantor for Family Doctors Medical Office Building lease in Shreveport, LA.
Guarantor for Hanover Emergency Center FED lease in Mechanicsville, VA.
Guarantor for Sand Point Medical Properties lease in Escanaba, MI.
Guarantor for Haas Medical Office Park lease in Ottumwa, IA.
Guarantor for three Chesterbrook Academy preschool and childcare center leases in Pennsylvania.
